items.condition: CCC severity inflation exceeds frequency decline for 4+ consecutive quarters
items.action: Close PGR short entirely; reallocate proceeds to CPRT
items.threshold: 4 consecutive quarters: severity growth > frequency decline

items.condition: Waymo weekly rides plateau or decline for 2+ consecutive quarters
items.monitoringData: Alphabet quarterly earnings; third-party estimates (CNBC, Wedbush)
items.action: Reduce GOOGL from 30% to 15%; move 15% to cash
items.threshold: 2 consecutive quarters of flat or declining weekly rides

items.condition: Fatal AV incident triggers federal investigation or operational moratorium
items.action: Close GOOGL (Waymo component), PGR short, LKQ short; retain NVDA on datacenter thesis; retain CPRT
items.threshold: NHTSA operational halt or congressional moratorium issued

items.condition: LKQ repairable claim volumes stabilize or rebound for 2+ consecutive quarters
items.monitoringData: CCC repairable claims data; LKQ quarterly earnings
items.threshold: 2 consecutive quarters of flat or rising repairable claims

items.condition: PGR combined ratio rises above 100 for non-AV reasons (catastrophe losses, reserve development)
items.action: Cover PGR short — signal is cyclical, not structural
items.threshold: PGR combined ratio > 100 for non-AV reasons
